description: Game object definitions — shrines, chests, doors, waypoints, and interactive objects.

description - not loaded.description: Brief reference description (not loaded by game)

nTgtFX.description: Front target X offset in subtiles

nTgtFY.description: Front target Y offset in subtiles

nTgtBX.description: Back target X offset in subtiles

nTgtBY.description: Back target Y offset in subtiles

FrameDelta0.description: Animation playback rate for mode 0 in 256ths

FrameDelta1.description: Animation playback rate for mode 1 in 256ths

FrameDelta2.description: Animation playback rate for mode 2 in 256ths

FrameDelta3.description: Animation playback rate for mode 3 in 256ths

FrameDelta4.description: Animation playback rate for mode 4 in 256ths

FrameDelta5.description: Animation playback rate for mode 5 in 256ths

FrameDelta6.description: Animation playback rate for mode 6 in 256ths

FrameDelta7.description: Animation playback rate for mode 7 in 256ths

CycleAnim0.description: Whether to loop animation for mode 0 (neutral)

CycleAnim1.description: Whether to loop animation for mode 1 (operating)

CycleAnim2.description: Whether to loop animation for mode 2 (opened)

CycleAnim3.description: Whether to loop animation for mode 3 (special 1)

CycleAnim4.description: Whether to loop animation for mode 4 (special 2)

CycleAnim5.description: Whether to loop animation for mode 5 (special 3)

CycleAnim6.description: Whether to loop animation for mode 6 (special 4)

CycleAnim7.description: Whether to loop animation for mode 7 (special 5)

Lit0.description: Light radius in subtiles for mode 0 (neutral)

Lit1.description: Light radius in subtiles for mode 1 (operating)

Lit2.description: Light radius in subtiles for mode 2 (opened)

Lit3.description: Light radius in subtiles for mode 3 (special 1)

Lit4.description: Light radius in subtiles for mode 4 (special 2)

Lit5.description: Light radius in subtiles for mode 5 (special 3)

Lit6.description: Light radius in subtiles for mode 6 (special 4)

Lit7.description: Light radius in subtiles for mode 7 (special 5)

BlocksLight0.description: Whether this object casts shadow in mode 0

BlocksLight1.description: Whether this object casts shadow in mode 1

BlocksLight2.description: Whether this object casts shadow in mode 2

BlocksLight3.description: Whether this object casts shadow in mode 3

BlocksLight4.description: Whether this object casts shadow in mode 4

BlocksLight5.description: Whether this object casts shadow in mode 5

BlocksLight6.description: Whether this object casts shadow in mode 6

BlocksLight7.description: Whether this object casts shadow in mode 7

HasCollision0.description: Whether collision checking is used in mode 0

HasCollision1.description: Whether collision checking is used in mode 1

HasCollision2.description: Whether collision checking is used in mode 2

HasCollision3.description: Whether collision checking is used in mode 3

HasCollision4.description: Whether collision checking is used in mode 4

HasCollision5.description: Whether collision checking is used in mode 5

HasCollision6.description: Whether collision checking is used in mode 6

HasCollision7.description: Whether collision checking is used in mode 7

IsAttackable0.description: Whether clicking uses kick mode (1) or neutral mode (0)

EnvEffect.description: Whether the object produces ambient sound/environmental effects

IsDoor.description: Whether the object is treated as a door

BlocksVis.description: Whether the object blocks player vision (works with IsDoor)

Trans.description: Type of palette color mapping applied

PreOperate.description: Whether the object runs its operate function before player interaction

Yoffset.description: Vertical graphical offset from animation pivot in pixels

Xoffset.description: Horizontal graphical offset from animation pivot in pixels

Draw.description: Whether to draw the object graphics on screen

HD.description: Whether the head DCC component is used

TR.description: Whether the torso DCC component is used

LG.description: Whether the legs DCC component is used

RA.description: Whether the right arm DCC component is used

LA.description: Whether the left arm DCC component is used

RH.description: Whether the right hand DCC component is used

LH.description: Whether the left hand DCC component is used

SH.description: Whether the shield DCC component is used

S1.description: Whether special DCC component 1 is used

S2.description: Whether special DCC component 2 is used

S3.description: Whether special DCC component 3 is used

S4.description: Whether special DCC component 4 is used

S5.description: Whether special DCC component 5 is used

S6.description: Whether special DCC component 6 is used

S7.description: Whether special DCC component 7 is used

S8.description: Whether special DCC component 8 is used

TotalPieces.description: Total number of selectable DCC components

Xspace.description: Horizontal spacing in subtiles between instances

Yspace.description: Vertical spacing in subtiles between instances

NameOffset.description: Vertical pixel offset for displayed object name

MonsterOK.description: Whether monsters can spawn near this object

OperateRange.description: Distance in subtiles from which the player can use this object

Restore.description: Whether the object persists in memory (1) or disappears off-screen (0)

Lockable.description: Whether this object can be locked

Gore.description: Whether the object is a gore/corpse decoration

Sync.description: Whether to keep client and server object state in sync

Flicker.description: Whether the emitted light should flicker

Damage.description: Amount of damage dealt by this object on contact

Overlay.description: Whether a visual overlay is applied

CollisionSubst.description: Whether special collision substitution checking is used

Left.description: Left boundary of bounding box in pixels

Top.description: Top boundary of bounding box in pixels

Width.description: Width of bounding box in pixels

Height.description: Height of bounding box in pixels

OperateFn.description: Function called when the player clicks/operates the object

PopulateFn.description: Function controlling how contents are populated on spawn

InitFn.description: Initialization function called when the object is created

RestoreVirgins.description: Restore only unoperated objects (1) or all objects (0)

BlockMissile.description: Whether missiles collide with this object

DrawUnder.description: Draw as floor tile (1) instead of normal rendering (0)

OpenWarp.description: Whether to display warp destination text
